1. **`/mnt/data/clungcord/packages/client/src/components/MessagePane.tsx`** -- Added a send button right after the emoji button inside the `input-wrapper`. It uses a paper plane SVG icon. On click, it calls `__richInput.extractText()` on the input ref, sends the trimmed text via `handleSend()`, and clears the input with `__richInput.clear()`. Same flow as pressing Enter.
